title: Cozy Minimalist Living Room with Comfortable Armchair and Soft Lighting
description: A serene and cozy living room corner featuring a comfortable beige armchair adorned with textured cushions and a knitted throw blanket. Soft natural light filters through sheer curtains, illuminating the simple, minimalist decor. A small wooden side table holds a potted plant, a lit candle, and a ceramic mug, enhancing the warm and peaceful atmosphere. The room is styled with neutral tones and natural materials, creating a calm and inviting space perfect for relaxation.
